title: Bugclear Fruit and Veg Plant Protection Concentrate, 210ml
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Effective bug control Controls blackfly, greenfly, whitefly, mealy bugs, spider mites and other mites. Same day spray and eat Ideal for use on fruits and vegetables (as well as ornamental plants), with same day spray and eat. For use in organic systems Uses active ingredients derived from nature and is suitable for use in organic systems. Next page 1 Effective Bug Control 2 Same Day Spray & Eat 3 For Organic Systems Controls aphids, mealy bugs, red spider mites and other mites BugClear Fruit & Veg concentrate controls aphids, mealy bugs, red spider mites and other mites. It is ideal for use on fruit and vegetables (same day spay and eat), and also for use on ornamentals. Based on rapeseed oil, the product is fully certified for use in organic gardening. The bottle is made from 100% recycled material. Why should I use BugClear Fruit & Veg? BugClear Fruit & Veg kills a wide range of common insects including aphids. Same day spray and eat. Where can I use BugClear Fruit & Veg? Ideal for ornamental plants, fruit and vegetables. Do not treat sensitive species of floral plants with delicate foliage. Do not spray directly onto blooms. Any run-off onto desirable surfaces should be washed away as staining can occur. When should I use BugClear Fruit & Veg? Spray at the first signs of insects or symptoms until plants are clear of pests. For optimal control and persistence of effect, repeat applications are required at 7-10 day intervals. The best time to spray is early morning or early evening. How do I use BugClear Fruit & Veg? Shake the bottle well before use. Using the measuring cap provided, add 20ml to 1 litre of water. Mix and use with a pressurised sprayer immediately. Spray evenly to wet upper and lower surfaces of leaves. Compare our range of plant pest and disease control products BugClear Fruit&Veg Conc.
